sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67090" key="metelau/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μετελαύνω</orth>, <sense id="n67090.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drive to fresh pasture</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πρόβατα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philostr.</author> </bibl> </cit> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">V A</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
